name: create_issue
description: Create a new Linear issue with optional parent linking. Supports self-assignment using "me" as assigneeId.

teamId.description: ID of the team to create the issue in. Required unless parentId is provided.

parentId.description: ID of the parent issue. If provided, creates a subissue.

assigneeId.description: ID of the user to assign the issue to. Use "me" to assign to the current authenticated user, or a specific user ID.

labelIds.description: Array of label IDs to attach to the issue

projectId.description: ID of the project to associate the issue with

name: update_issue
description: Update an existing Linear issue. Supports self-assignment using "me" as assigneeId and cycle assignment via cycleId.

issueId.description: ID or key of the issue to update

description.description: New description for the issue (markdown supported)

status.description: New status name for the issue (e.g., "Todo", "In Progress"). Must be valid for the issue's team.

assigneeId.description: ID of the new assignee. Use "me" to assign to the current authenticated user, or a specific user ID.

cycleId.description: ID of the cycle to assign the issue to. You can provide a cycle name (e.g., "2"), a relative cycle ("current", "next", "previous"), or a cycle UUID directly.

name: get_issue
description: Get detailed information about a specific Linear issue including optional relationships and cleaned content

issueId.description: The ID or key of the Linear issue

includeRelationships.description: Include comments, parent/sub-issues, and related issues. Also extracts mentions from content.

name: search_issues
description: Search for Linear issues using a query string and advanced filters. Supports Linear's powerful filtering capabilities.

query.description: Text to search in issue titles and descriptions. Can be empty string if only using filters.

includeRelationships.description: Include additional metadata like team and labels in search results

filter.description: Advanced filters using Linear's filtering capabilities.

projectId.description: Filter issues by project ID. Takes precedence over projectName if both are provided.

projectName.description: Filter issues by project name. Will be used to find matching projects if projectId is not provided.

name: get_teams
description: Get a list of Linear teams with optional name/key filtering

nameFilter.description: Optional filter to search by team name or key

name: create_comment
description: Create a new comment on a Linear issue

issueId.description: ID or key of the issue to comment on
ID or key of the issue to delete

name: get_projects
description: Get a list of Linear projects with optional name filtering and pagination

nameFilter.description: Optional filter to search by project name

includeArchived.description: Whether to include archived projects (default: true)

first.description: Number of items to return (default: 50, max: 100)

after.description: Cursor for pagination. Use the endCursor from a previous response to fetch the next page

name: get_project_updates
description: Get project updates for a given project ID with optional filtering parameters

projectId.description: ID of the project to get updates for

includeArchived.description: Whether to include archived updates (default: true)

first.description: Number of items to return (default: 50, max: 100)

createdAfter.description: ISO date string. Only return updates created after this date

createdBefore.description: ISO date string. Only return updates created before this date

userId.description: Filter updates by creator. Use "me" to find updates created by the current user, or a specific user ID

name: create_project_update
description: Create a new update for a Linear project

projectId.description: ID of the project for which to create an update

body.description: Content of the update in markdown format

health.description: Health status of the project at the time of the update

isDiffHidden.description: Whether to hide the diff between this update and the previous one
